claim: Captured waveform contains a 60 Hz-spaced harmonic ladder
required_evidence: Discrete peaks at integer multiples of 60 Hz in the post capture
uncertainty: FFT bin spacing = 2 Hz (0.5 s capture)
baseline_result: Baseline peak table also shows 6 mains-coincident peaks
injection_sensitivity: ladder detection power high for amp>=0.5
limitation: Native 2 Hz resolution; sub-bin estimates required for exact frequency

claim: Canonical Python log-cos result is reproducible in R
required_evidence: best k, delta chi2, A, phi within tolerance of summary.json
limitation: Deterministic part exact; shuffle null compared by distribution only

claim: Exact 2:3:4 frequency geometry occurs in the detected peaks
uncertainty: Exact by construction on integer harmonics
limitation: Both triplets lie on the 60 Hz ladder and SHARE the 240 Hz peak; not independent

claim: Log-cos modulation exceeds the canonical shuffle null
required_evidence: Observed scan-max delta chi2 above shuffle scan-max distribution
limitation: Reproduces the canonical shuffle result, BUT the shuffle null is anti-conservative on colored noise (calibration fig18), so this exceedance is not by itself strong evidence.

claim: Log-cos modulation survives colored-noise / mains-harmonic nulls
required_evidence: Observed exceeds AR colored-noise and mains-ladder null distributions
observed_result: shuffle_canonical p=0.00498; block_perm_L8 p=0.363; stationary_bootstrap p=0.134; colored_noise_AR p=0.119; mains_harmonic p=0.259

claim: Harmonic ladder is an optically induced device state (not mains pickup)
required_evidence: Control separation: baseline/sham/disconnected/dark differ from post
observed_result: Not evaluable: baseline is peak-table only; no raw control waveforms
control_result: MISSING: sham, disconnected, terminated, dark, channel-swap, battery
limitation: The central causal claim cannot be tested without raw control captures

claim: Structure persists beyond the recorded capture
required_evidence: Multiple sequential timestamped post captures showing decay
observed_result: Single 0.5 s post waveform; within-capture stability only
limitation: No long-duration claim can be made from one 0.5 s capture

claim: A resonator quality factor (Q_resonator = pi f tau) is established
required_evidence: Identified oscillation frequency + directly measured decay
observed_result: Not measured; no ringdown time series
limitation: Q_ratio (2/3 geometry) must not be confused with a resonator Q

claim: Spectral structure is consistent with ordinary 60 Hz mains pickup
required_evidence: Exact 60 Hz spacing, baseline already mains-coincident
observed_result: All ladder peaks at integer*60 Hz; baseline shows same coincidence
limitation: Mains pickup is a fully viable explanation given available data
